examples: This entirely normal inward rolling is called pronation.
When the arch collapses inward, this "pronation" absorbs shock.
This type of shoe has a softer midsole and more flexibility that will not inhibit natural pronation.
Pronation and plantar fascitis seem to disappear when you start using your feet the way they were designed to be used.
These help to keep your wrists in a neutral position by preventing under or over pronation -bending them too much up or down.
